title: Intense Molten Canadian Chestnut Mushroom Curry
description: A rich and creamy curry featuring chestnut mushrooms, perfect for a date night, with a blend of mustardy and slightly sweet flavors, this plant-based-friendly dish is a Canadian twist on traditional bhuna curry.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat and add the mustard seeds, letting them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add the chopped onion and saute until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced chestnut mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Stir in the curry powder and cook for 1-2 minutes, until the spices are fragrant.
Pour in the coconut milk and add the salt, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let cook for 10-15 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the mushrooms are tender.
Stir in the pitted dates and let cook for another minute, until they are heated through.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed, then serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
